节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Register event callback when the current print task is in process.
注释信息: @param { 'block' } type - Indicates the print task has been blocked.
@param { Callback<void> } callback - The callback function for print task change event
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - the application does not have permission to call this function.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types.

parameters.说明: Indicates the print task has been blocked.
The callback function for print task change event

error_codes.description: the application does not have permission to call this function.
Parameter error. Possible causes: 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types.
